creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry from comment #0)
Hi Dmitry,

You already have mariadb-connector-c if you install mariadb102-client. It makes no sense having both on a system. Don't know why they rename the library path between client and connector installs...

On my system, building mariadb-connector-c whilst mariadb102-client is installed will fail on CONFLICTS already.
